meaning: adj.复制的,副的,两重的,两倍的,完全相同n.复制品,副本vt.复写,复制,使加倍,使成双
examples: Is this a duplicate or the original?
His task will be to duplicate his success overseas here at home.
Robert Anderson to duplicate his Mexican success in the sub-continent.
They couldn't duplicate the success two days later, and were eliminated on the road.
Hilariously enough, fears of the duplicate items somehow being removed from the system proliferated.
